## Why

"Automatic Filtering" undersells the feature — the keyword lists are generated by AI (Claude), making "AI Filtering" an accurate and more compelling label. Rebranding now aligns the feature name with its actual technology and improves perceived value on the App Store and in-app.

## What Changes

- All user-facing strings that say "Automatic Filtering" updated to "AI Filtering" across all localizations (en, he, ar, es, fr, pt-BR)
- Screen titles, section headers, notifications, and help text updated
- Help text updated to mention that lists are AI-generated
- AI Filtering icon on the home screen gains a periodic lightning bolt animation on iOS 17+ (double-spark every 1.5s), disabled when Block All Unknown is active or Reduce Motion is enabled
- No behavioral or code-level changes (manager/class names stay the same)

## Capabilities

### New Capabilities
- `ai-filtering-branding`: UI copy rebrand and icon animation for the AI Filtering feature

### Modified Capabilities
- `automatic-filters-cache`: The user-facing name of this feature changes to "AI Filtering"; no requirement changes to caching behavior itself

## Impact

- `Simply Filter SMS/Resources/*.lproj/Localizable.strings` — all localization files need string updates
- `Simply Filter SMS/View Layer/Screens/AppHomeView.swift` — icon animation using `phaseAnimator` + `Task`-based timer
- No API, CoreData, or extension changes required
- Localization files for non-English languages (ar, es, fr, pt-BR, he) will need translated equivalents of "AI Filtering"
